figures.caption: FIGURE 3 Illustration of the crosstalk between nitrate signaling and peptide as well as sucrose signaling. Pointed and blunt arrowheads indicate activating and inhibiting interactions, respectively. The thick arrow indicates the shoo-to-root or root-to-shoot translocation.
context_sentences: FIGURE 3 Illustration of the crosstalk between nitrate signaling and peptide as well as sucrose signaling.

candidate.caption: FIGURE 3 Illustration of the crosstalk between nitrate signaling and peptide as well as sucrose signaling. Pointed and blunt arrowheads indicate activating and inhibiting interactions, respectively. The thick arrow indicates the shoo-to-root or root-to-shoot translocation.

factual_observations.observation: The diagram shows interactions between nitrate signaling, peptide signaling, and sucrose signaling.
CEP is involved in NO3- deficiency signaling.
CEPDL2 is connected to both CEPD and NO3- deficiency.
Surcose is linked to HY5 and photosynthesis.
NRT2.1 and NRT2.2 are involved in NO3- uptake.
KIN10 degradation is linked to NO3- and carbon deficiency.

nitrogen_relevance.reason: The diagram includes terms related to nitrate signaling and uptake.
